category_sources: source_facts.description says C++ wrapper around CGAL; official SFCGAL docs say SFCGAL supports ISO 19107/OGC Simple Features Access geometry operations: https://sfcgal.gitlab.io/SFCGAL/
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitLab project use SFCGAL as the project name: https://sfcgal.gitlab.io/SFCGAL/
docs_sources: Official GitLab Pages site contains installation, development, and API documentation: https://sfcgal.gitlab.io/SFCGAL/
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.com/sfcgal/SFCGAL; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official docs describe a C++ wrapper around CGAL, OGC Simple Features support, and geometry operations: https://sfcgal.gitlab.io/SFCGAL/
